page.title: Belief Map
page.description: Classify beliefs with 4 dimensions, read impact distribution, and keep psychology as an optional lens.

classification.title: 4-D Belief Classification
classification.description: Group, filter, and map cognition by 4 dimensions; impact stays on each belief, not in the main filters.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: Which part of life this belief acts on.

impact.title: Impact Direction
impact.description: Impact is not a fifth classification dimension; it belongs to each belief.

entries.title: Belief List
entries.description: Details always show impact and the optional psychology lens.

questions.title: Recurring Questions
questions.description: Keep the questions you repeatedly ask yourself.

relations.title: Relations
relations.description: Beliefs can be similar, opposed, or derived from each other.

cards.title: Three-Layer Frame
cards.description: A summary frame for worldview, life view, and values.

toast.deletePending: {{name}} is queued for deletion. Undo is available for 5 seconds.

error.required: Enter a title and belief statement

revision.autoSummary: Updated this belief in management mode.

empty.questions: No questions under the current filter.
empty.entries: No beliefs under the current filter.
empty.relations: No belief relations under the current filter.
empty.cards: No three-layer frame under the current filter.
empty.conflicts: No conflicting beliefs under the current filter.
empty.changing: No changing beliefs under the current filter.
empty.limiting: No limiting beliefs under the current filter.
